Who We Are

240+ Satisfied Clients

Florida homeowners and property managers who trust us.

At All Florida Construction & Roofing, we specialize in reliable flat roof repairs, restorations, and replacements for residential and commercial properties across all of Florida. With high-quality materials & skilled craftsmanship.

Trust our experienced team to keep your property safe, resilient, and well-protected — no matter the weather.

92%

Client Satisfaction

98%

Project Completion
Our Services

Florida Flat Roof Specialists

We focus exclusively on flat roofs — repair, restoration, and replacement. No jack of all trades. Just experts.

Roof Repair

Fast, targeted repairs for leaks, damaged sections, blisters, and storm damage. We stop the problem before it spreads.

  • Emergency same-day response available
  • Storm damage & leak repairs
  • Detailed inspection report included
Best Value — Save Up to 60%
Most Popular

Roof Restoration

Premium silicone coating extends your roof life 15+ years at a fraction of replacement cost. The smart choice for Miami flat roofs.

  • Seamless silicone coating system
  • 15-year manufacturer warranty
  • Energy savings up to 35%

Roof Replacement

Full tear-off and new roof system when restoration is not an option. Premium materials, clean removal, workmanship guarantee.

New Construction

Complete roofing systems for new builds — residential and commercial. From blueprint to final inspection.

Our Work

Real Roofs, Real Results

See the transformation our restoration delivers — same roof, better protection, at a fraction of replacement cost.

Why Choose Us

The All Florida Difference

We don't just fix roofs — we solve problems for Florida property owners who need someone they can trust.

Licensed & Fully Insured

Florida-licensed and fully insured. Your property and peace of mind are completely protected on every job.

13+ Years Across Florida

Over a decade serving clients across all of Florida. We know what flat roofs in this climate need to survive.

15-Year Warranty

Every restoration comes with a 15-year manufacturer warranty. We back our work in writing, guaranteed.

Transparent Pricing

No surprises, no hidden fees. We give you an itemized quote and explain every line item before work begins.

Fast Turnaround

Most restorations completed in a single day. We respect your operations and minimize disruption to your property.

Florida Code Compliant

All our work meets Florida Building Code and wind uplift requirements. Permits handled, inspections passed.

Your Reliable Partner
for Every Project.

We believe true excellence lies in the details. From personalized service to top-quality workmanship.

How It Works

Trusted Hands for Your
Roof's Protection.

From your first call to a weatherproof roof — we've made the process fast, transparent, and stress-free.

We assess your flat roof at no cost — no obligation. You'll receive a full report with photos and honest recommendations.

Transparent, itemized pricing delivered in 24 hours. We explain every option and recommend the best fit for your budget — no hidden fees.

Our licensed crew completes the work efficiently. Clean site, guaranteed quality, and you're back to normal fast.

FAQ

Common Questions Answered

Have more questions? Call us or request your free inspection — we'll address everything in person.

That's exactly what our free inspection determines. If your flat roof deck is structurally sound — no major rot, core failure, or standing water — restoration is almost always the better choice at 60–70% less cost. Our inspector gives you an honest assessment with photos, no sales pressure.

Most flat roof restorations are completed in a single day. Larger commercial roofs (10,000+ sq ft) may take 2–3 days. Unlike full replacement, there's no tear-off or heavy debris — your tenants or business experience minimal disruption.

Restoration typically costs $4–$8 per sq ft depending on condition and prep needed. A full replacement runs $15–$25+ per sq ft. On a 5,000 sq ft commercial roof, that's the difference between $20,000–$40,000 vs $75,000–$125,000.

Yes. We restore and replace flat roofs on residential homes, townhomes, and condos across all of Florida. The process is the same — free inspection, itemized quote, and fast installation.

We install all major flat roof systems: TPO, EPDM, modified bitumen, built-up roofing (BUR), and silicone coating systems. We recommend the best fit for your building type, budget, and local climate after inspection.

Yes. We are fully licensed under Florida roofing contractor regulations and carry full general liability and workers' compensation insurance. We can provide certificates of insurance before any work begins.

Yes, for any work that requires a permit under Florida Building Code, we handle the permit process entirely — application, scheduling inspections, and final sign-off. You don't have to worry about compliance.

Our restorations come with a 15-year manufacturer warranty on the coating system plus our workmanship guarantee. Replacements are covered by the manufacturer's material warranty plus our own workmanship warranty. All warranties are transferable to new owners.

Nothing special is required. Just make sure we have access to the roof — either via interior hatch or exterior ladder. Our inspector will handle everything and provide you with a written report and photos within 24 hours.

Yes. We work with financing partners to offer flexible payment options — many clients can start with little or no money down. Ask about current programs when you schedule your free inspection.

Properly installed and maintained flat roofs perform well in hurricane conditions. We use Miami-Dade approved materials rated for high wind uplift. Silicone coating systems create a seamless membrane that eliminates seams — the most common point of failure during storms.

Often yes — if the leak is isolated to a specific area (flashing, pipe penetration, seam), targeted repair can solve it quickly and affordably. We'll tell you honestly if a repair is the right fix or if the roof has broader issues that require a larger solution.

Still have questions?

Our team is happy to answer anything. No bots, no runaround — just real answers.
